about.title: About
about.intro: Esteban Fichet, 21, based in Dijon. Hooked on code since high school, I build performant web apps that balance technical rigor and user experience. Curious and self-driven, I enjoy taking projects from idea to production.
about.approach: I treat every project like a product: understand the business need first, then build a sober architecture that holds up over time. I write readable code, document what matters, and ship early to iterate fast.
